series_metadata.series_title: Historical Records, Materials and Artifacts for Commemorative Events and Displays
series_metadata.series_description: Records documenting events or milestones of individual schools, school districts and educational service centers, where these events are not documented in other records (such as board minutes, transcripts, etc.) Including but not limited to award lists, baccalaureate and commencement programs, cumulative class rankings, diploma order lists, final grade point summaries, honor roll lists, graduating class history files, student newspapers, yearbooks/annuals.
